Interface INetworkTraceConfiguration

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that access named trace configuration information.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("2746C123-A968-4661-8E25-0BB55414DCCE")]
public interface INetworkTraceConfiguration
